subject: Create cc-teams SKILL.md reference skill
description:
Create the main `cc-teams` reference skill at `claude/claude-tools/skills/cc-teams/SKILL.md`. This is a comprehensive reference for Claude Code's Agent Teams features.

Must include YAML frontmatter:
```yaml
---
name: cc-teams
description: Reference for Claude Code Agent Teams — lifecycle, messaging, spawning, orchestration, and hooks
user-invocable: false
disable-model-invocation: false
last-verified: 2026-02-23
---
```

Content must cover (under 400 lines total):

1. **Overview** — Purpose as a shared reference for Agent Teams
2. **TeamCreate Tool** — Complete parameter table (team_name, description, agent_type), return behavior
3. **TeamDelete Tool** — Parameters, prerequisites (no active members), cleanup behavior
4. **Team Lifecycle** — creation → member spawning → coordination → shutdown → cleanup, with state diagram
5. **Teammate Spawning** — Task tool with team_name parameter, subagent_type selection, name parameter, run_in_background, isolation options
6. **Idle State Semantics** — Idle is normal (not error), idle teammates can receive messages, automatic idle notifications, do not react to idle unless assigning work
7. **Environment Variables** — CLAUDE_CODE_TEAM_NAME, CLAUDE_CODE_AGENT_NAME, and other auto-set vars in teammates
8. **Spawn Backends** — in-process, tmux, iTerm2 with selection guidance
9. **File Structure** — `~/.claude/teams/{team-name}/config.json`, `~/.claude/tasks/{team-name}/`, inboxes/, member discovery via config.json
10. **SendMessage Overview** — Brief overview of 5 message types (details in messaging-protocol.md reference)
11. **Self-Referential Loading Instructions** — How to load reference files:
    - `Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/cc-teams/references/messaging-protocol.md`
    - `Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/cc-teams/references/orchestration-patterns.md`
    - `Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/cc-teams/references/hooks-integration.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] SKILL.md documents TeamCreate and TeamDelete tools with complete parameter tables
- [ ] Team lifecycle documented: creation → member spawning → coordination → shutdown → cleanup
- [ ] Teammate spawning via Task tool with team_name parameter documented with all spawn parameters
- [ ] Idle state semantics explained (idle is normal, not an error; idle teammates can receive messages)
- [ ] Environment variables auto-set in teammates listed
- [ ] Spawn backends documented (in-process, tmux, iTerm2) with selection guidance
- [ ] File structure documented (~/.claude/teams/, ~/.claude/tasks/, config.json, inboxes/)
- [ ] YAML frontmatter includes `user-invocable: false` and `disable-model-invocation: false`
- [ ] Self-referential Read instructions for references/ files included

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Sections organized so consumers can skip to relevant parts (e.g., just messaging, not orchestration)
- [ ] File stays under 400 lines for context efficiency
- [ ] Optional cross-reference to cc-tasks provided, not mandatory

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] `Last Verified` date included in frontmatter

**Testing Requirements:**
• Verification: Valid YAML frontmatter parses correctly
• Verification: All team tool parameters match Claude Code system prompts
• Verification: File is under 400 lines

Source: internal/specs/claude-tools-plugin-SPEC.md Section 5.2 (US-004)
